center.name: 卡哈馬卡
center.summary: 卡哈馬卡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Black-chested fruiteater、Blue-backed conebill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its range extends on the eastern side of the Andes from southern Colombia, through Ecuador, to northern Peru; it is found in montane forests and its altitudinal range is . It also occurs as separate populations locally on the western side of the Andes at Cajamarca and in the south of Marañón Province.{{cite book|last1= Schulenberg|first1=Thomas S.|last2= Stotz|first2=Douglas F.|last3= Lane|first3=Daniel F

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: sitticolor continues on the western slopes of the Andes until it reaches the southern limit of its range in Cajamarca. C
